productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Barricade Team Black Silver Red Shoe
description: Offering immediate comfort and absolute performance on the court, the Barricade Team tennis shoe from adidas is an upgrade of the Barricade6.0. UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations for absolute breathable comfortMeshed and plushly padded tongue and collar for absolute breathability and snug comfortadidas patented 3-Stripe overlays in synthetic leather on the midfoot region for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceLace-up system for a snug, customized FitInner bootie for wrap-around comfortadiTuff toe protection guard for enhanced durability and protection on the courtMidsoleMoulded EVA footbed for absolute anatomical comfort and impact protectionTorsion system for better stability on various terrainadiPRENE inserts in the heel for absolute cushioning, and adiPRENE+ in the forefoot for enhanced cushioned comfortOutsoleNon-marking rubber outsole made with adiWEAR technology for absolute durabilityHerringbone grooves throughout with a pivot point on big toe mound for absolute grip and traction, and easy 180 degree moveMent of the footShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
